name: Zhejiang Jiaao Enprotech Stock Co., Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Jiaao Enprotech Stock Co., Ltd engages in the research, production, and sale of plasticizers in China and internationally. It offers epoxy, fossil, and multifunctional composite products. The company provides its products for use in cables, artificial leather, flocking, light box membranes, plastic films and decking, outdoor water pipes, etc. Zhejiang Jiaao Enprotech Stock Co., Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Tongxiang, China.
